name: Cox Communications
description: Cox Communications is a leading American telecommunications provider offering broadband internet, cable TV, and phone services for residential and business customers.

itemListElement.name: Cox Broadband Internet
itemListElement.description: High-speed broadband internet services for residential and business customers.

itemListElement.name: Cox Cable TV
itemListElement.description: Cable television services with extensive channel lineup.

itemListElement.name: Cox Mobile
itemListElement.description: Mobile phone services powered by Cox Communications.

makesOffer.name: Cox Account Management API
makesOffer.description: REST API for managing Cox customer accounts, including service subscriptions, billing information, user profiles, and service feature configuration.

makesOffer.name: Cox Network Diagnostics API
makesOffer.description: REST API providing network diagnostic tools for Cox broadband subscribers.

makesOffer.name: Cox Business Services API
makesOffer.description: REST API for Cox Business customers to manage voice, internet, and cloud connectivity services.
